audit_items.proof_trace: Both re-validations are present: `s_auctionStarts[asset] != 0` is re-read from storage at L327-329 (catches concurrent starts), and the USD value check at L346-348 uses the stale performData amount × fresh price. For the standard hasFeeAggregator=true path, `transferForSwap` calls `safeTransfer(to, stale_amount)` at L321 before the per-asset loop, meaning any balance decrease that would violate minAuctionSizeUsd causes a full revert — no invalid auction is started. Fresh price at performUpkeep time makes the check more conservative, not weaker.
